title: Error: Expecting expression to be constant, but can't convert a SCOPENAME to constant

features.name: $info with percent-m format specifier inside generate block
features.description: Code should include a $info system task with %m format specifier inside a generate block
features.snippet: generate for (genvar id=1; id < N_IDS_PER_STAGE; id++) begin : g_adj localparam int unsigned ID_PLUS = SRC_ID + id; $info("%m: ID_PLUS=%0d", ID_PLUS); end endgenerate

features.name: localparam computed from module parameter and genvar in generate loop
features.description: Code should include a localparam computed from a module parameter and a genvar variable inside a generate loop, used as an array index
features.snippet: generate for (genvar id=1; id < N_IDS_PER_STAGE; id++) begin : g_adj localparam int unsigned ID_PLUS = SRC_ID + id - (SRC_ID + id < N_IDS ? 0 : N_IDS); assign out_v[ID_PLUS] = in_v; end endgenerate

features.name: unpacked array assignment with localparam index from generate loop
features.description: Code should include an unpacked array output where the index is a localparam computed from a module parameter and genvar inside a generate block
features.snippet: output logic out_v[N_IDS-1:0]; generate for (genvar id=1; id < N_IDS_PER_STAGE; id++) begin : g_adj localparam int unsigned ID_PLUS = SRC_ID + id; assign out_v[ID_PLUS] = in_v; end endgenerate
